headline: Home Sales, Nvidia, Walmart, Home Depot, Target, and More to Watch This Week
summary: As earnings season wraps up, we’ll also see results from Deere, Toll Brothers, and Intuit. Economic data will spotlight construction and purchasing activity.

headline: NVDA Earnings, Alphabet Conference and Other Can't Miss Items this Week
summary: Markets face a reasonably quiet week, but it will be dominated by Wednesday's Nvidia (NVDA) earnings and Alphabet's two-day developer conference, creating a critical test for AI infrastructure investment sustainability and technology sector leadership.
